name: squeeze-claw
description: Cross-agent context compression and durable memory layer with Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw adapters

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts && tsup cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.build:cli: tsup cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
